hero.title: toasted with love, served with soul
hero.subtitle: specialty coffee & ice-cream toasts, made fresh every day

home.aboutTitle: a little café with a big heart
home.aboutBody: the toastery started as a simple idea: pair great coffee with playful, generous toasts. today we're a small corner of msheireb where locals and visitors slow down for a moment.
home.ctaBody: from birthdays to brand pop-ups, we cater events and take shop enquiries.

menu.title: menu
menu.subtitle: small batch, made to order

iceCreamToasts.desc: brioche, vanilla bean ice cream, honey drizzle

iceCreamToasts.desc: pistachio ice cream, toasted nuts, date syrup

iceCreamToasts.name: biscoff bliss
iceCreamToasts.desc: biscoff ice cream, cookie crumble, caramel

iceCreamToasts.name: berry cream toast

menu.note: prices and availability may vary — ask in-store for today's specials

story.title: our story
story.body1: the toastery was born from a love of slow mornings and good company. we roast with care, source thoughtfully, and build every toast by hand.
story.body2: you'll find us tucked into msheireb downtown doha — a quiet spot to catch up with a friend, get some work done, or just enjoy a really good coffee.
story.quote: every cup and every toast is made the same way: with intention.

contact.title: contact & socials
contact.body: say hello, or find us on social media.
